Obviously, these photos don’t exactly represent the best that the camera has to offer. For one, the Camera app running on the phone (which pulls a lot of the weight when it comes to Pixel photos) is an early release version on these devices. And clearly the photographer behind these shots isn’t shooting the best of what the phone could take in the first place.
https://9to5google.com/2018/08/24/google-pixel-3-xl-camera-samples-gallery/
